sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44992" key="eu)ruga/stwr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐρῠ-γάστωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n44992.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">big-bellied</tr_>: metaph., of the sea, Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0548.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:8:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.8.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
